summary: 30 founder interviews show meaningful problem severity but no activation. Interest exists, yet the funnel breaks between demo/trial and first value.

observed_blockers.detail: Prospect said legal blocked data sharing.

state_assessment.interpretation: The problem appears real for a subset of founders, but trust and onboarding friction likely prevent trial users from reaching first value.

recommended_next_experiment.name: Activation-focused guided pilot
recommended_next_experiment.hypothesis: Reducing legal/data-sharing friction and simplifying onboarding will improve trial-to-activation conversion.
recommended_next_experiment.target_segment: Next 5-10 qualified prospects who match the severe-pain profile
changes: Provide a no-sensitive-data or synthetic-data evaluation path
Provide a short legal/trust FAQ or security one-pager
Run concierge onboarding with a single explicit activation milestone

success_metrics.primary: At least 2 activations from the next 5-10 trials
secondary: Clearer visibility into onboarding drop-off points
